package.inclusions_text: L1: Standard inclusions - Doctor's fee, OT charges, Anasthetic Charges, Drugs, Investigations, Professional charges, Room rents, Nursing & administrative charges | L3: Special Investigations - Assays, high end hormonal studies, SPECT, A scans,etc. | L4: Modalities of treatment - Laproscopy/abdominal/vaginal/etc.
package.exclusions_text: L2: Implants - IOL, Pacemaker, Ortho prosthesis, Stents, staplers
package.inclusions_text_clean:
- Doctor's Fee: Included
- OT Charges: Included
- Anesthetic Charges: Included
- Pharmacy: Included
- Investigations: Included
- Professional Charges: Included
- Room Rent: Included
- Nursing & Administrative Charges: Included
- Special Investigations: Assays, high-end hormonal studies, SPECT, A scans
- Modalities of Treatment: Laparoscopy, abdominal, vaginal, etc.
package.exclusions_text_clean: - Implants: IOL, Pacemaker, Ortho prosthesis, Stents, staplers

pf_analysis.recommendation_reason: PF from 20 same-room standard cases billing near P50

warnings: Stay defaulted to the package master's duration — 4 days for [ORT5511] (pre 0 / post 4); cohort history stays as the reference band.

suggestions.message: GIPSA Insurance historically prices this as Total Knee Replacement (TKR) — Unilateral (Conventional) + robotic add-on

dnb.note: FC estimate shows only patient_payable. DNB items (patient ₹0) are hidden from FC; billing_disposition + four_value are metadata for the insurer/audit view.

expected_nme.basis: HIMS NME history · GIPSA Insurance · Open Bill · ORTHOPAEDICS (n=95)

lines.note: 5% GST on the full room rent (₹8500/day > ₹5,000).
ICU/CCU/ICCU/NICU/HDU room rent is GST-exempt even above ₹5,000.

tax.note: GST is a separate line, additive to the base estimate (not folded into the parity-pinned total).
